description: A richly colored illuminated manuscript page showing an enthroned ruler wearing a crown and holding a scepter, seated on an ornate golden throne. Courtiers and nobles flank him on both sides, some kneeling, others bearing banners. The banner at right bears a black double-headed eagle on gold. Below the central scene are four heraldic shields showing various coats of arms including a cross, a wheel, a double-headed eagle, and a striped shield. A German inscription runs across the top. The whole composition is framed within a decorative red border.
